Registry / Terms / type-specific parameter

type-specific parameter

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00352 · 10 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 9 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102008OIML D 31:2008
#02220
3.1.53
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type Example: Considering a measuring system of of instrument only. Type-specific parameters are part of the legally relevant software
ok
20102007OIML R 21:2007
#00352
2.2.8.2
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of taximeter only. They are fixed at type approval of the taximeter. Examples of type-specific parameters include software identification and parameters used for fare calculation and rounding
pending
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01350
T.2.7.7.3
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type ofinstrument only Type-specific parameters are part of the legally relevant software. They are fixed at type approval of the instrument.
pending
20102006OIML R 76-1:2006
#00934
T.2.8.3
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type ofinstrument only. Type-specific parameters are part of the legally relevant software. They are fixed at type approval of the instrument
pending
202X2023OIML D031:2023
#03599
3.2.70
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of instrument, component and/or module subject ot legal control Adapted form [OIML V 1:2022, 2.04]
pending
202X2020OIML R150-1:2020
#03600
2.2.9.3
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of instrument only
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:2017
#03685
3.3.6.3
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of instrument only (VIML, 4.11)
pending
202X2011OIML R106-1:2011
#02555
0.2.8.3
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of instrument only a legally relevant parameter is fixed at type evaluation of the instrument examples of type-specific parameters are: parameters used for mass calculation, stability analysis or price calculation and rounding, software identification
pending
202X2007OIML R 21:2007
#00352
2.2.8.2
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of taximeter only. They are fixed at type approval of the taximeter. Examples of type-specific parameters include software identification and parameters used for fare calculation and rounding
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01350
T.2.7.7.3
legally relevant parameter with a value that depends on the type of instrument only Type-specific parameters are part of the legally relevant software. They are fixed at type approval of the instrument. Examples: Parameters used for weight value calculation, stability analysis or price calculation and rounding, software identification.
pending
